name: Comedian In The Big City
description: A free to play comedy game, find the jokes and win over the crowd in this chill comedy platformer.

name: FPSCore
description: Competitive arena based FPS. If you enjoyed the Quake series and are looking for a fast paced, skill based, action packed multiplayer PVP shooter then look no further. FPSCore comes packed with the old school movement mechanics you know and love; bunny hopping, rocket jumping, wall surfing and more!

name: Forbidden: A First's Obsession
description: Meet Nemesis; Ascendent being and terminally bored. Until the shimmer at the end of Creation, known as the Void, becomes her fixation - and her undoing. A short linear visual novel with gorgeous hand-painted illustrations; a mythic tale of curiosity and consequences.

name: The Boomies Show
description: A frantic twin-stick roguelite set in a candy-coated amusement park turned massacre arena. Dual weapons, recoil mastery and modular builds. Survive the waves, push your luck and extract before the show swallows you whole.

name: Mini Mayhem: Flood Fighters
description: Miniature Mayhem: Flood Fighters is a player-versus-player game for up to 4 players. Weaponless robots come alive and scavenge for toys and batteries while trying to stay alive from each other and the flooding house.

name: X-Ray 2D
description: A fast-paced and challenging 2D platformer where precision, reflexes, and exploration are essential to overcome traps, obstacles, and secret-filled levels.

name: Gobballing
description: Become the hero no one saw coming! Play as a ambitious goblin who dreams of glory and smashes his way through monsters using nothing but his trusty rock!

name: Phoenix 2
description: A fast-paced shoot 'em up where skill matters. Master over 100 ships, unleash powerful special abilities, and blast through waves of Invaders. Play a new mission every day and climb the world-wide leaderboards.

name: The Tracy Arm Tsunami Experience
description: Explore Tracy Arm, Alaska and trigger a massive landslide tsunami in a first-person simulation with land, air, and water viewpoints.

name: Soul Land: Awakening World
description: The first-ever 3D open-world MMORPG of the Soul Land saga is here! Featuring dual-authorization from the original novels and anime—this time, redefine the Soul Land universe!

name: Blooming Winter
description: A old-school top-down dungeon crawler where you explore and fight through the gardens of an old, abandoned castle. The game starts off simple, with new mechanics and more complicated room layouts being added as you go.

name: GEODE
description: In this top-down, multiplayer, co-op game, you must protect your Core Crystal by any means necessary. Build up your defenses, explore, refine, and upgrade to reach your goal. Play alone or with up to 8 people.

name: For the Fish in the Bottle
description: In the vast desert, you discover a tiny fish sealed inside a small bottle. It seems to want something. Solve the puzzles to collect the items the fish desires.

name: GraveBoy CrowFeet - A Quest for Skulls
description: A spooky fun 2D adventure with focus on exploration and light puzzling. Help GraveBoy to collect 10 rare skulls to save his father from a demon!

name: HeroTail: Survivors
description: HeroTail Survivors is a run-based roguelike where your heroes form a living chain. Level up, recruit followers, and stack powerful set bonuses while battling through waves of enemies and unlocking permanent upgrades.

name: Hearty Haven
description: Your a specialist entering the children's wellness centre, its your job to find the truth and deactivate the robots, the mascots will hunt you... Only equipped with a company issued magnet watch, its up to you to hide from these monsters and survive with your body still in one piece.

name: ams的MBTI测试
description: MBTI test questions by ams. Explore yourself with a unique test!

name: Suck It Up!
description: Suck It Up! Is an action-adventure where you take the role of an exterminator, tasked with clearing a city of its critter infestation. Dust off your vacuum cleaner and suck up the pests to save Cloud Town!

name: Enter The Moshpit
description: A point-and-click adventure set in the Italian underground scene. Navigate the streets of Livorno as a local punk, solve inventory-based puzzles, and use branching dialogues to sneak into a hardcore concert. A short, satirical story featuring item combination and a cynical narrative.

name: Rogue Assault
description: A real-time strategy military game that lets you directly command your units, with no build times and impressive 3D visuals. Set in a post‑apocalyptic Europe - form alliances with other commanders, fight for resources and territory and rise in honor as a war commander.

name: Lord and Maiden
description: "Lord and Maiden" is a fantasy simulation building and girl-raising strategy game. Freely plan the development of your city-state, explore secret realms, challenge powerful enemies, and form alliances of up to 100 players to fight together and create your ideal home.

name: Duke vs The Gang
description: A Wild West bullet hell where you mix drinks into attacks, blast enemies from afar, and whip them up close. Dodge chaotic patterns, discover new combinations, and outplay unique bosses in fast-paced, precision-driven duels.

name: Starship Theory
description: Starship Theory is a ship building survival game. Mine and trade to gather resources. Plan and construct new upgrades. Train and manage crew. Fight to survive.

name: Генеральские котлы
description: «Генеральские котлы» — это юмористическая пародия, сделанная по мотивам популярного мема. Короткая игра, где каждая деталь была продумана до мелочей. Мена?

name: surfass
description: surfass is a speedrunning parkour game that goes really fast! Let your legs burn, they are the price of speed. Master the slide jump and climb the leaderboard!

name: Nova Strider
description: An indie top-down sci-fi score-attack game about blowing up aliens in the upper atmosphere! Compete against your friends locally and see who can get the highest score on the leaderboard.

name: And No One Was There
description: This deeply personal, atmospheric journey leads you through a childhood home now filled with shadows and silence. Exploring and uncovering old diaries, notes, and open meaning evokes melancholy, nostalgia, and reflection on loss, memory, and the bonds that tie us to home.

name: Linebound
description: One player navigates. One player creates. Linebound is a 2D asymmetric co-op puzzle platformer where one player navigates the world while the other draws platforms in real time. Progress is only possible through communication.

name: Grill Your Friends Prematch
description: Grill your friends as cute marshmallow bears in a 2-4 player local party game! Enjoy the screams of your former friends as you march into victory!

name: BünzliFight: Swiss City Simulator
description: Cooperative real time city building simulator with Swiss flair. Build a town together manage resources and budgets solve quirky everyday problems and experience a world that keeps running even when you are offline.

name: Dawn of Corruption
description: A NSFW fantasy RPG about Muscle Growth, Macro, Hyper, and a substance that turns men into massive, muscular beasts. What will you grow into? Will corruption seep into your being?

name: The Lakeview Orb 2: Consequences
description: A linear first‑person psychological horror game focused on completing objectives, exploring environments, and progressing through visual cutscenes as you play as Dr. Jim in the next chapter of the Lakeview Orb story.

name: Dung Battles
description: An action puzzle game where you play as a dung beetle, battling against your beetle peers to create the biggest dung ball. Battle online to test your ball rolling skills, strategically roll up items to win in challenge mode, or follow a young beetle's journey home in story mode.

name: Richard
description: Welcome to Rose Academy, home to the brightest students in the world! Play as the new transfer student, George, as he embarks on his campaign against Richard, the most popular kid in school. Develop friendships, master your grades, and talk your way to earning the title of Prom King!

name: Week of the MEP
description: A tiny, fan-made visual novel featuring Pavolia Reine. Experience a working week filled with unexpected encounters and humor behind the peafowl persona.

name: Anomaly Zone Renovation
description: A-Zone Renovation is a continuation of the legendary Zone, combining the classic stalker atmosphere with revised mechanics. A large-scale rebalancing, from weapons to economy, a new role-playing system, an improved interface, PvE and PvP activities - the Zone is ready to grow with its community.

name: Curtain Call
description: Explore a cursed theater and persevere through all manners of dangers in this first-person survival horror game. Developed by third year students from Breda University of Applied Sciences.

name: Are You A Pilot
description: Are You A Pilot is a free-to-play neon arcade runner about speed, reflexes, and survival. Dodge obstacles, collect plasma, fire lasers, unlock skins, chase high scores, and jump into online squad runs.

name: RoboDeal Simulator Prologue
description: Design, craft, and trade robots on the frozen world of Xylaris-9. Serve factions, upgrade your facility, and shape your robotic legacy in Robodeal Simulator.

name: Control, I'm Not Coming Back
description: Control, I'm Not Coming Back is a short and emotional narrative game about a lost astronaut searching for a reason to keep going forward while facing the emptiness of space. Inspired by the Hopecore aesthetic, it’s a story about positivism, friendship and our human connection with Voyager 1.

name: Echoes of Creation: Origin
description: An open-world 3D action RPG with real-time combat, class advancement, and loot-driven progression.

name: HAM TANK!
description: This is a top-down shooting game where a small and adorable hamster pilots a gigantic tank to fight off enemies. Players control the tank from a bird’s-eye view, shooting at enemies that attack from all directions while progressing through each stage.

name: VoxelMancy
description: Online voxel sandbox where you can build anything imaginable. Forget simple cubes – sculpt slopes, curves, and structures of any size with many realistic materials. Your imagination is the only limit!

name: Caldra
description: Deckbuilding, tactics, and dramatic comebacks — the ultimate competitive card game! Buy and sell cards to strengthen your deck and fight for victory. Disrupt your opponent or seize the moment to strike. Caldra is a competitive deck-building card game driven by strategy and mind games.

name: The Retro Exorcist
description: You've been hired to perform exorcisms on all sorts of entities. The only thing you can't seem to understand is...why do they all haunt video games?

name: 1.76复古沉默
description: 全新传奇《1.76复古沉默》，耗时两年精心雕琢，倾尽心血打造诚意巨献！以原创剧情为灵魂的基础上，它保留了传奇的核心玩法（打怪、升级、爆装备、攻沙巴克）超级大陆为舞台🌏，秉持“不肝不氪”的友好理念🥰、不同职业的多种流派等独具特色的新内容，让游戏体验既怀旧又新奇

name: Iris Odyssey
description: Iris Odyssey is a text-based adventure game. In the heart of Shibuya, an orphaned girl searching for her family and a magical crime investigator are brought together by fate. Their journey will challenge them and spark a battle against unimaginable forces. A modern fantasy adventure begins.

name: Teaching Gender-Affirming Care
description: An educational visual training simulation that follows transgender and gender-diverse patients at a primary care clinic. Step into the role of a new provider as you prescribe and optimize hormone therapy, counsel patients around surgical affirmation, navigate care considerations for adolescents

name: Salmon Tower
description: BOOST and JUMP with momentum! A platforming and semi-Foddian climber. Make your way to the TOP of the Dark Tower! You could say it's a documentary of the Salmon's natural instincts to swim upstream...

name: Robosynthesis
description: A solar-powered robot awakens in an abandoned data center. — In this short 3D platformer, your movement, health, and ammo all use precious solar energy. Plan your actions carefully to seek freedom, as every step may be your last.

name: Starlocked
description: A voxel-based first-person roguelite miner set in an alternate future where the Cold War never ended. You take on the role of a convict forced to labor in a space prison. Fly out into the machine infested asteroid field and gather resources to pay off your debt.

name: Phasebreak
description: In this turn based strategy game, your tactics are pushed to the limit as you need to consider not one,- but two gameboards. Warp both friend and foe between them, master interdimensional gunfights, and confidently strategize around RNG-free abilities in this FREE student project!

name: Choozle!
description: A diorama-style puzzle adventure game where players solve puzzles using four unique flower buds. Each bud has a different ability, such as growing plants, destroying obstacles, or removing petrification. Collect stars across stages, complete optional challenges, and restore the broken constellation.

name: Magic Dodgeball: Homeless Edition
description: A chaotic PvP action bullet hell where unemployed wizards battle in magical dodgeball duels. Fight with your friends, choose buffs between rounds and build absurdly powerful spell combos to survive and entertain!

name: PIKPOP
description: Mine your way through procedurally generated levels, digging ore and bombing enemies to achieve the highest score possible!

name: Against The Godds
description: Death has vanished, and nothing can die. Lead a party, battle the Godds, and forge your fate in this turn-based rogue-lite where every move is decided by the roll of the dice.

name: Aethelgard: Galactic Guardian
description: Command your ship, harvest precious resources, and upgrade your arsenal in a relentless sci-fi universe. Aethelgard: Galactic Guardian is an action-packed space shooter where you must build the ultimate vessel to survive epic battles against elite alien fleets.

name: AIM/FLASH Trainer
description: AIM/FLASH TRAINER is a minimal Team Finder aim trainer for Valorant players. Practice precision, switching, tracking, depth control and flash reaction with clear result tracking for FPS training.

name: ORUN
description: Follow Orun through his journey to restore the guardian flame that once defended the city from creatures that now have devastated the land.

name: 超凡功夫之王传奇
description: 三职业高爆传奇—专为兄弟们打造的热血国战版本！在这里，你将一步步练成真正的功夫之王。极品装备、绝世武学全都靠打，BOSS随便虐，爆率高到你想笑。战鼓已擂响，拳头已握紧，拿起你的屠龙宝刀，用一身真功夫和兄弟们一起攻沙、称王。

name: Imaginary Kingdom
description: A 3D hidden object game where you explore a small medieval kingdom from a child’s imagination, searching for the objects your mother has asked you to find, with no pressure or time limits.

name: 等一个蛋 / Waiting for an Egg
description: A pixel-art idle game for those "waiting for an egg." Here, your time is your budget. Buy "breeds," start the long "review cycle," and automatically "grind" for inspiration. Collect rare "inspiration eggs," expand your coop, and decorate your farm.

name: Meteor Swarm Old School
description: Shoot meteors with a variable fire main, and various different power-ups. Survive and set a new hi-score today!

name: MoSimulator
description: MoSimulator is a robotics simulation game with an arcade feel that lets players mod in their own robots. Experience the excitement of competitive student robotics in a fun, accessible format where you can bring your own robot designs to life and compete in simulated matches.

name: BRAVO
description: A 20‑minute playable thriller that will blow your mind.

name: The Pharhad Road
description: A Persian-inspired tactical RPG where enemies wake when they see you. Lead four pahlavans across one connected road, manage scarce recovery, and try Command Divs, Call Pharhad, Send Dastur Z, or Pahlavan Chess for alternate tactical chaos.

name: Chasing Whiskers
description: Catch cats in this cozy adventure game! After falling into Catworld through an interdimensional portal, you must find your missing cat by completing errands for Ponpon, the local Cat Café owner. Chase, catch and collect until you can find your way home! This game is made by students.

name: 巴比伦:人与人之战
description: A cyberpunk visual novel about AI, humanity, and the meaning of life. Follow a silver-haired android in a divided futuristic Babylon, where every truth reveals a deeper conflict between humans and artificial beings.

name: TBH: Task Bar Hero
description: The ultimate tiny idle RPG! Adorable pixel heroes are waiting to join your adventure — from your taskbar. Fight off the boredom of work and daily life with diverse classes, skills, items, and builds!

name: Hop Hop! Donut
description: Strap on balloons and soar through the skies as Donut the corgi in this adorable 2D platformer! Battle evil cats, dodge deadly obstacles, and rescue your kidnapped owner in a whimsical adventure inspired by Balloon Fight.

name: Ex Libris
description: Ex Libris is a library-crawling RPG adventure set in a 16th century monastery, inspired by the writings of Umberto Eco, Francois Rabelais, and Clark Ashton Smith.

name: Dark Room
description: This is Dark Room, an indie game made by an 11-year-old in which a ball traverses a procedurally generated maze with a flashlight in hand and attempts to escape. This game is great for people who like surprises around every corner.

name: Farmnana Defence
description: ▎ Defend your farm with magical bananas! Collect and enhance 20+ bananas across 5 tiers, build your farm by day, and survive monster waves by night. Face 5 epic bosses in 25 waves and endless Infinite Mode.

name: PATCHED
description: PATCHED is about a lonely, abandoned doll who awakens in an empty, decrepit factory. In search of answers, they begin to explore the factory and piece themselves back together, encountering other dolls along the way.
